name: Basic French Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, vinegar, and water in a bowl and whisk until well blended.
2. Add sugar, mustard, MSG, pepper, salt, Worcestershire sauce, and Hungarian paprika to the bowl. Whisk until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Stir in grated onion.
4. If desired, fold in crumbled blue cheese.
Makes 1 3/4 cups
This dressing pairs well with the addition of crumbled blue cheese if you prefer.
